display_name: Raylawni G. Branch and Jeanette Smith
role_summary: Joint oral history at the Library of Congress; this catalog page treats the combined transcript as a single embedding signature.
ai_reading: Raylawni G. Branch and Jeanette Smith's top semantic neighbor is Charles McLaurin (entry 17, count 115); the broader cluster includes Peggy Jean Connor (#96), Vernon Dahmer, Jr. (#121), Freddie Greene (Biddle) (#44).
biographical_paragraph: This joint oral history is held at the Library of Congress as entry 100 of the Civil Rights History Project (American Folklife Center accession AFC 2010/039) [src: 1]. The LoC transcript carries a publication-block audit tier: known issues exist that prevent full publication-grade certification, and any specific biographical or quoted claims drawn from the transcript itself should be confirmed against external sources before citation. Independent biographical sourcing for an extended orientation paragraph is pending; the strongest signal currently available is the embedding pattern named in the AI's reading above.
